# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept because the source is a research preprint with explicit experimental evaluation results.

## Why

The source is an arXiv preprint describing a benchmark study of repository context files for coding agents, with concrete empirical payload: benchmark construction, task counts, comparative success-rate effects, and measured cost changes. It clearly meets institute criteria through real experimental results rather than commentary or architecture description.

## Limits
